reviews.comment:
Un lugar que tiene todo lo que el asociado necesita, amplio buffet, sanitarios impecables, atencion buena en la parte combustibles, cocheras a buen precio, todo ello en el vorazon de Bahia Blanca, es decir pleno centro a dos cuadras de la plaza principal. Ahhhhh, la atencion en la Administracion, muy merituable, excelente, para destacar!!!

(Translated by Google)
A place that has everything the member needs: a large buffet, impeccable restrooms, excellent service at the fuel department, affordable parking, all in the heart of Bahia Blanca, right in the center of town, just two blocks from the main square. Ahhh, the service at the front desk is very commendable, excellent, and definitely worth mentioning!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlc3YtZXRnRRAB
